description: Marqo is an AI-native ecommerce search and product discovery platform for retailers. It powers catalog search, recommendations, merchandising, analytics, event tracking, and conversational or visual discovery experiences.
summary: Marqo exposes four public HTTP API surfaces: the main ecommerce Search & Discovery API, a separate Analytics API, an Event Tracking ingestion API, and an Image Detection API; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was documented.
